Reasons I Love You
Memories
June 3, 2026
My Dearest Nyree,
— ✦ —

Omg 1 month na tayo, parang kailan lang no,Gusto ko lang sabihin na sobra akong nagpapasalamat na nakilala kita, di ko expect talaga and i'm thankfull kay lord na pinagtagpo niya tayo, Sorry sa lahat ng nagawa kong kasalanan and thankyou kasi kahit na sobra na yung mali kong nagagawa ket patuloy mo pading iniintindi ako kahit alam mong may iba kang iniisip. Hindi ko alam kung paano babawi sayo. and grabe nakita ko kung pano ka brave love paano mo kinaya lahat ng problems and challenges mo and i really apreaciate that ish, yun lang muna naiiyak nako ditooo ish lovee, ILOVEYOU SO YOU ALWAYS MY LOVE, this is only the beginning love mas marami pang challenges na dadating lovee kayanin natin okay? I will try my best love to handle also my emotions! I LOVE YOU MY FUTURE WIFEY😘!!

This is only the beginning. Month one of forever.

— ✦ —
Yours, completely
